basic_details.job_title: NFSU Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU) has released the official Assistant Professor Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the NFSU Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of Ph.D. in the relevant discipline, Master's Degree with 60% marks, M.Sc., MCA, M.E., M.Tech, or other prescribed qualifications can apply online on or before 25 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details and relaxation criteria.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in relevant discipline, Master's degree with 60% marks, M.Sc./MCA/ME/M.Tech in Computer Science/Information Security/Cyber Security/Digital Forensics or relevant discipline, M.Sc. in Forensic Science, Master Degree in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Biology/Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Genetics/Molecular Biology or relevant discipline
qualification.details: Assistant Professor - School of Cyber Security and Digital Forensics: Ph.D. in relevant discipline with first class or equivalent (minimum 60% or equivalent) at the preceding degree i.e. M.Sc./MCA/ME/M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering/Information Security/Cyber Security/ Digital Forensics/Cyber-Forensics/Network Technology /Information-Technology/ Data-Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Machine Learning/ IoT Security or relevant discipline from recognized university or equivalent with very good academic record throughout. Desirable: experience in Cyber Security and one SCI Journal publication. Assistant Professor - School of Forensic Sciences: Ph.D. in relevant discipline with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree (minimum 60% or equivalent) i.e. M.Sc. in Forensic Science with specialization in the appropriate field i.e. Forensic (Physics/ Ballistics/ Biology/Chemistry/Toxicology/Fingerprint/Questioned Document) OR First class or equivalent Master Degree in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Biology/Biochemistry/Biotechnology/ Human-Biochemistry/ Microbiology/ Genetics/ Molecular Biology or any other relevant discipline from recognized university or equivalent with very good academic record throughout. Desirable: experience in Forensic Science and one SCI Journal publication. Assistant Professor - School of Law, Forensic Justice & Policy Studies: A good academic record, A master's degree with 60% marks (or equivalent grade) with Ph.D. in a concerned /relevant /allied subject from an Indian University or an equivalent degree from an accredited Foreign University. Preference shall be given to Ph.D. Holders/candidates with Ph.D. registration/Net-JRF. Specialization in Cyber Law and/or Public Law. Publication in Scopus or Web of Science and experience in prior teaching would add weightage.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor - School of Cyber Security and Digital Forensics
Assistant Professor - School of Forensic Sciences
Assistant Professor - School of Law, Forensic Justice & Policy Studies

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NFSU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFSU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NFSU Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date for filling the online application form and making the payment is 25th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant Professor at NFSU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Assistant Professor position across various schools at the National Forensic Sciences University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by specialization but generally include a Ph.D. in a relevant discipline, with a Master's degree holding at least 60% marks. Specific details are provided in the eligibility criteria section.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. For SC/ST candidates, the fee is Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Professor positions ranges from Rs. 68,000 to Rs. 90,000 per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant Professor roles?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor positions will primarily involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a contractual or permanent job?
faq.answer: The NFSU Assistant Professor positions are contractual in nature, as indicated in the job details.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NFSU Assistant Professor recruitment must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the NFSU located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the National Forensic Sciences University campus located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxations for reserved categories, as this information is not explicitly detailed here.
